package rulecoverage

func NegativeNullableSqlTypesLeakIntoApiDto() string {
    ruleID := "nullable_sql_types_leak_into_api_dto"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Response or request DTOs that expose `sql.Null*` types instead of boundary-friendly contract types."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
